query: SELECT e.id, e.projectId, e.expenseType, e.amount, e.expenseDate, e.dataOrigin, p.name as projectName FROM expenses e LEFT JOIN projects p ON e.projectId = p.id WHERE e.expenseType = 'materiales_proyecto' AND e.dataOrigin = 'manual' AND e.deletedAt IS NULL LIMIT 10
